## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI/build

## Testing

- [ ] Ran unit tests
- [ ] Manually launched TuneMatrix, if UI behavior changed
- [ ] Tested on Windows/macOS/Linux, if platform-specific
- [ ] Verified optional dependency behavior, if relevant

Commands or notes:

```text

```

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated README/docs, if needed
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md, if user-facing
- [ ] No documentation update needed

## Checklist

- [ ] No generated audio files, exports, temp files, or local environments committed
- [ ] No personal editor settings committed
- [ ] New dependencies are documented and justified
- [ ] Original audio files remain unmodified by the workflow
- [ ] Missing optional tools still produce clear user-facing behavior
